name: Piece Together
description: A full-stack web application designed for project management of game development teams. The platform provides project managers and team members a workspace to manage tasks, collaborate, track bugs, organise game assets, and monitor project progress using industry-standard tools such as Kanban boards.

name: SEAtS
description: A React-based web application designed to automate seating arrangements for business events. Built in an Agile environment with continuous feedback and iterations, the app automatically generates seating plans based on two main constraints: avoiding repeat pairings from past events and ensuring VIPs are assigned to designated tables.

name: GeoQuest
description: A location-based mobile application inspired by geocaching. It allows users to discover and unlock virtual caches by visiting real-world locations. The app uses GPS and mobile sensors to create an interactive treasure hunt experience, enabling users to locate caches, unlock them when within range, and track their progress through persistent data storage.

name: Habit Tracker
description: A native Android mobile application developed in Kotlin to help users build and maintain positive habits through daily tracking and wellbeing activities. The app allows users to create, manage, and monitor habits, view progress summaries, and receive meaningful insights into their routines.

name: PicMe
description: A React-based web app that allows users to create personalized Polaroid-style photos. It lets users create personalized Polaroid photos by adding frames and stickers. Users can upload or take a photo, customize it with frames and stickers, and download the final image easily.

name: Paw And Pixel
description: A website built with PHP and MySQL that simulates a rental business. Users can browse available games and book gaming machines for rent through a basic interface.

name: Heiwa
description: Heiwa is a planner application designed to help users manage their tasks and improve wellbeing by reducing procrastination. It features an interactive pet and a Sudoku mini-game to motivate users to stay focused and complete their goals. The app is built using Python for the backend, Tkinter for the desktop interface, and MySQL for data management.

name: CV Builder
description: A Java-based desktop application developed as part of a university project. It allows users to create and manage basic CVs by inputting details such as name, job title, email, and references. The application supports saving and loading CVs using plain .txt files, offering a simple way to store and update resume information offline.
